title: PUE Calculation Algorithm
description: Algorithm to calculate Power Usage Effectiveness for a data center
code:
// PUE Calculation Algorithm
// Inputs: Total Facility Power (kW), IT Equipment Power (kW)

BEGIN
 INPUT totalFacilityPower
 INPUT itEquipmentPower

 IF itEquipmentPower <= 0 THEN
 PRINT "Error: IT power must be positive"
 EXIT
 END IF

 pueRatio = totalFacilityPower / itEquipmentPower

 PRINT "PUE Ratio: " + pueRatio

 // Evaluate efficiency
 IF pueRatio < 1.2 THEN
 PRINT "Rating: Very Efficient (Green)"
 ELSE IF pueRatio < 1.5 THEN
 PRINT "Rating: Efficient (Light Green)"
 ELSE IF pueRatio < 2.0 THEN
 PRINT "Rating: Average (Yellow)"
 ELSE
 PRINT "Rating: Inefficient (Red) - Needs Improvement"
 END IF

 // Calculate energy waste
 wastePercentage = ((pueRatio - 1) / pueRatio) * 100
 PRINT "Energy Waste: " + wastePercentage + "%"
END
explanation: This algorithm calculates PUE by dividing total facility power by IT equipment power and provides efficiency ratings based on industry standards. Lower PUE indicates better energy efficiency.

title: Green IT Investment ROI Calculator
description: Algorithm to calculate return on investment for green IT initiatives
code:
// Green IT Investment ROI Calculator
// Inputs: Investment Cost, Annual Energy Savings, Carbon Reduction, Project Years

BEGIN
 INPUT initialInvestment // in Rs.
 INPUT annualEnergySavings // in Rs.
 INPUT annualCarbonReduction // in kg CO2
 INPUT projectYears

 // Calculate simple payback period
 paybackPeriod = initialInvestment / annualEnergySavings
 PRINT "Payback Period: " + paybackPeriod + " years"

 // Calculate NPV (Net Present Value) with 10% discount rate
 discountRate = 0.10
 npv = 0

 FOR year = 1 TO projectYears DO
 discountFactor = 1 / ((1 + discountRate) ^ year)
 npv = npv + (annualEnergySavings * discountFactor)
 END FOR

 npv = npv - initialInvestment
 PRINT "Net Present Value: Rs. " + npv

 // Calculate ROI percentage
 totalBenefits = annualEnergySavings * projectYears
 roiPercentage = ((totalBenefits - initialInvestment) / initialInvestment) * 100
 PRINT "ROI: " + roiPercentage + "%"

 // Environmental impact
 totalCarbonSaved = annualCarbonReduction * projectYears
 PRINT "Total Carbon Reduction: " + totalCarbonSaved + " kg CO2"

 // Decision
 IF npv > 0 THEN
 PRINT "Recommendation: INVEST - Positive NPV"
 ELSE
 PRINT "Recommendation: RE-EVALUATE - Negative NPV"
 END IF
END
explanation: This algorithm calculates various financial metrics for green IT investments including payback period, NPV, and ROI, while also tracking environmental benefits from carbon reduction.

title: E-Waste Assessment Algorithm
description: Algorithm to assess and categorize e-waste for proper disposal planning
code:
// E-Waste Assessment and Categorization
// Inputs: List of IT assets with type, age, and condition

BEGIN
 DECLARE assetsList
 DECLARE disposalSchedule = []
 DECLARE recyclableList = []
 DECLARE hazardousList = []
 DECLARE reusableList = []

 FOR EACH asset IN assetsList DO
 // Calculate environmental impact score
 impactScore = 0

 IF asset.age > 5 THEN
 impactScore = impactScore + 30
 END IF

 IF asset.hazardousMaterial == TRUE THEN
 impactScore = impactScore + 40
 END IF

 IF asset.recyclability == "Low" THEN
 impactScore = impactScore + 20
 END IF

 // Categorize based on condition and impact
 SELECT CASE asset.condition
 CASE "Good":
 ADD asset TO reusableList
 PRINT "Option: Refurbish and Donate"
 CASE "Functional":
 ADD asset TO recyclableList
 PRINT "Option: Recycle Materials"
 CASE "Damaged":
 IF asset.hazardousMaterial == TRUE THEN
 ADD asset TO hazardousList
 PRINT "Option: Certified Disposal Required"
 ELSE
 ADD asset TO recyclableList
 PRINT "Option: Recycle"
 END IF
 END SELECT
 END FOR

 // Generate summary report
 PRINT "\nE-Waste Management Summary:"
 PRINT "Items for Reuse: " + reusableList.length
 PRINT "Items for Recycling: " + recyclableList.length
 PRINT "Items Requiring Hazardous Disposal: " + hazardousList.length

 // Calculate diversion rate
 totalItems = assetsList.length
 divertedItems = reusableList.length + recyclableList.length
 diversionRate = (divertedItems / totalItems) * 100
 PRINT "Landfill Diversion Rate: " + diversionRate + "%"
END
explanation: This algorithm helps organizations categorize e-waste for proper handling - directing items toward reuse, recycling, or certified hazardous disposal based on condition and material type.

complexity.time: O(n) where n = number of assets
